description_long: This is a three-armed ceiling-mounted sconce with a central metallic fixture and three evenly spaced lamp shades. The shades are cylindrical and opaque, likely made of frosted glass or acrylic, and are supported by elegantly curved metal arms. Each arm ends in a small decorative drop, adding a touch of classic style. The fixture is suspended from a chain, which connects to a ceiling mount. The overall design is symmetrical, with the shades forming a triangular arrangement around the central stem. The metallic parts have a polished finish, contrasting with the matte appearance of the shades.
description: A ceiling-mounted sconce with three frosted cylindrical shades on curved metal arms, suspended by a chain and featuring decorative drops.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lamp shades and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and decorative drops.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth of the shades and the curvature of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central fixture and the even spacing of the shades.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, emphasizing the chain suspension and the alignment of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a transitional design blending classic and modern elements, with smooth metallic arms, frosted cylindrical shades, and subtle decorative drops for a touch of elegance.
